name: Crakerjack
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Divide the popped popcorn between 2 large bowls.
3. Oil two lined cookie sheets well and set aside.
4. In a deep saucepan, combine the brown sugar, corn syrup, butter, salt, and cream of tartar.
5. Insert a candy thermometer into the mixture.
6. Bring to a boil and cook over medium heat for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the thermometer registers 260 degrees Fahrenheit (hard ball stage).
7. Remove from the heat and quickly stir in the baking soda. The mixture will foam up.
8. Pour the syrup mixture over the popcorn, half into each bowl.
9. Quickly work to coat all the popcorn with the caramel.
10. Spread popcorn evenly on the cookie sheets and bake for 1 hour, stirring 3 times.
11. Remove from the oven and spread popcorn on wax paper to cool, breaking up larger pieces if necessary.
12. Store in an airtight container.
